content:
What are the Major Stage 3 Demonstration & Pilot Programs?

{/* SDTC Demonstration */}
SDTC - Sustainable Development Technology Canada
Up to $15M
CleanTech Demo
Repayable

Canada's premier cleantech funding program supporting large-scale demonstration and pilot projects for climate change, clean air, clean water, and clean soil technologies at pre-commercial stages.

Demonstration Focus:
  • • Pre-commercial scale demonstration
  • • Real-world operating conditions
  • • Performance validation at scale
  • • Environmental impact measurement
Program Features:
  • • Up to 33% project funding (repayable)
  • • Multi-year project support
  • • Technical and business advisory
  • • Strategic partnership facilitation
{/* Clean Growth Program */}
Clean Growth Program - Innovation & Scale-up
Up to $10M
Industrial Pilots
Repayable

Federal program supporting clean technology demonstration and deployment in industrial settings, focusing on emissions reduction, energy efficiency, and resource productivity.

Project Types:
  • • Industrial demonstration projects
  • • First-of-kind installations
  • • Scale-up manufacturing pilots
  • • Commercial validation projects
Support Included:
  • • Up to 50% of eligible costs
  • • Repayable contribution structure
  • • Partnership development support
  • • Market access facilitation
{/* Sector Pilot Programs */}
Sector-Specific Pilot Programs
$1M - $5M
Industry Pilots
Varies

Industry-specific demonstration and pilot programs across agriculture, manufacturing, energy, and other sectors supporting technology validation in real-world applications.

Sector Examples:
  • • Agricultural technology pilots
  • • Manufacturing automation demos
  • • Energy system demonstrations
  • • Transportation technology pilots
Pilot Features:
  • • Real customer/user testing
  • • Performance data collection
  • • Business model validation
  • • Market feedback and iteration
{/* Strategic Innovation Fund */}
Strategic Innovation Fund (SIF) - Demonstration Stream
$10M - $50M+
Large Projects
Repayable

Federal program supporting large-scale demonstration projects with significant economic and innovation impact, particularly in strategic sectors and transformative technologies.

Project Requirements:
  • • Significant economic impact
  • • Strategic sector alignment
  • • Large-scale demonstration
  • • Job creation potential
Funding Structure:
  • • Repayable contributions
  • • Multi-year project timelines
  • • Co-investment requirements
  • • Performance milestones
shortAnswer: To apply for Stage 3: Demonstration & Pilot Funding Canada 2026, start by reviewing the eligibility criteria and preparing a project proposal. Complete guide to Canadian demonstration and pilot project funding. Access up to $15M through SDTC Demonstration, Clean Growth Program, sector pilots, and TRL 7-8 validation projects for. Funding available: up to $15M.
shortAnswerQuestion: How can my business apply for Stage 3: Demonstration & Pilot Funding Canada 2026 in 2026?

faq.question: What is the application deadline for Stage 3: Demonstration & Pilot Funding Canada  | SDTC & Clean Growth | Up to  Project Funding in 2026?
faq.answer: Deadlines typically vary by specific program tier. However, for 2026, many initiatives operate on a rolling intake basis until funds are depleted. Check the official portal for specific cutoffs.

faq.question: How much funding can I get through Stage 3: Demonstration & Pilot Funding Canada  | SDTC & Clean Growth | Up to  Project Funding?
faq.answer: Funding amounts range depending on business size and scope. Top awards can reach $15M.

faq.question: Do I have to give up equity for this program?
faq.answer: No. Government grants and subsidies are non-dilutive, meaning you retain 100% ownership of your company.

expertTip.title: Pre-Revenue Eligibility
expertTip.content: Demonstration funds like SDTC are specifically for pre-revenue technologies. If you are already selling the product commercially, you are too late for this stage.
